description: Bundled exemplar corpus for stories_v2. Add public-domain genre passages (Project Gutenberg, etc.) as additional .json files in this directory and they will be picked up by load_index() automatically.
extension_notes: For genre-specific exemplars, add files like cultivation_extended.json with passages from public-domain works (e.g., older Wuxia translations no longer under copyright). Tag each entry with the same schema.
